info.name: Amobear Nexus — Qonversion API v3
info.description:
Postman collection cho Qonversion API integration vào Amobear Nexus.

Doc reference: 126 — Qonversion Integration

## Setup
1. Vào Qonversion Dashboard → Project Settings → Copy Project Key, Secret Key
2. Set biến `project_key` và `secret_key` trong Environment
3. Set `base_url` = https://api.qonversion.io/v3
4. Thay `user_id` bằng Qonversion User ID thực

## Authentication
- Standard endpoints: `Authorization: Bearer {{project_key}}`
- Grant/Revoke entitlements: `Authorization: Bearer {{secret_key}}`

## Webhook Testing
- Folder 'Webhook Simulation' chứa mock payload để test Nexus webhook receiver

item.name: 01 — Users

request.description:
Tạo user mới trong Qonversion. Thường SDK tự tạo, dùng API cho server-side flows.

**Nexus use:** Verify user exists trước khi query entitlements.

Lấy thông tin user. Response bao gồm platform, environment, created_at.

**Nexus use:** User lookup khi AI Insight cần subscription context.

item.description: Quản lý Qonversion users. Mỗi app install tạo 1 Qonversion user.

item.name: 02 — User Properties

request.description:
Lấy custom user properties (country, app version, IDFA, etc.).

**Nexus use:** Enrich user data cho segmentation.
Set custom properties cho user. Dùng prefix `_amobear_` cho Nexus-specific properties.

item.description: User-level attributes cho segmentation và analytics.

item.name: 03 — Identity

request.description:
Link Amobear custom user ID với Qonversion user. Cho phép cross-device access.

**Nexus use:** Map Qonversion events tới Amobear internal user IDs.
Lookup Qonversion user_id từ Amobear identity_id.

item.description: Cross-platform user identity management. Map Qonversion user_id ↔ Amobear custom_user_id.

item.name: 04 — Entitlements

request.description:
Lấy tất cả entitlements (active + expired) của user.

Response bao gồm: active status, expires timestamp, product_id, subscription renew_state.

**Nexus use:** Cross-validate subscription status, AI Insight context.

⚠️ Dùng SECRET KEY — Grant premium access cho user.

`expires`: Unix timestamp khi entitlement hết hạn.

**Nexus use:** Admin tool — grant manual entitlements cho support cases.

⚠️ Dùng SECRET KEY — Revoke specific entitlement.

**Nexus use:** Admin tool — revoke access khi phát hiện fraud.

item.description: Quản lý premium access. GET dùng Project Key, POST/DELETE dùng Secret Key.

item.name: 05 — Products

request.description:
Lấy danh sách tất cả products đã cấu hình trong Qonversion.

**Nexus use:** Daily sync product catalog → StarRocks metadata table.

item.description: Quản lý IAP products đã cấu hình trong Qonversion dashboard.

item.name: 06 — Purchases

request.description:
Record web/Stripe purchase. Không cần cho mobile IAP (SDK handles).

**Nexus use:** Reference only — nếu Amobear có web subscription flow.

item.description: Record purchases (chủ yếu cho Stripe web purchases). App purchases tự tracked qua SDK.

item.name: 07 — Webhook Simulation

request.description:
Simulate trial_started event. No revenue. Nexus should:
1. Return 200 OK immediately
2. Save to MinIO
3. Insert into bronze.qonversion_events_raw
4. NOT trigger revenue alert

Simulate trial → paid conversion. HAS revenue (proceeds $8.49).
Nexus should: Insert with revenue, count towards iap_revenue_usd in Gold.
Simulate renewal. Same revenue as conversion. Nexus should add to daily revenue.

Simulate cancel. No revenue — user still has access until expiration_date.
Nexus should: Record event, count towards subscriptions_canceled in Gold.

⚠️ REFUND — NEGATIVE revenue. Nexus should:
1. Record with revenue_sign = -1
2. Subtract from daily iap_revenue
3. Count towards iap_refunds_usd
4. TRIGGER refund alert

Billing issue — payment failed. No revenue. Signal for churn prediction.
Note: VND currency, Android platform — test multi-currency handling.

One-time consumable IAP (coins). No expiration. Revenue counts towards IAP total.
Test: no subscription_period, no expiration_date.

⚠️ DUPLICATE of 7.2 (same transaction_id + event_name).
Nexus should: Return 200 OK but flag is_duplicate=true, NOT double-count revenue.

item.description:
Mock webhook payloads để test Nexus webhook receiver endpoint.

⚡ Gửi tới Nexus local/staging endpoint để validate processing pipeline.

item.name: 08 — Webhook Report Receiver

request.description:
Simulate Qonversion sending scheduled report download link.
Nexus should: Download CSV from link → Parse → Reconcile with webhook data.

item.description: Test Nexus endpoint nhận scheduled raw data report links từ Qonversion.

Qonversion Secret Key (sk_ prefix) — for grant/revoke entitlements only
